name: nato
title: NATO regional adapter pack
description: A per-country acquisition and interpretation pack for NATO member states. The engine stays region-agnostic; this pack chooses country-specific source adapters, shared forest leaf-type sources, vegetation knowledge, and layer styling. The Netherlands adapter is implemented with AHN LiDAR elevation and PDOK aerial imagery; the Norway adapter is implemented with Kartverket NHM DTM/DOM elevation and Sentinel-2 RGB+NIR imagery because Norge i bilder WMS/WMTS requires token or Norway Digital access from this environment; the Spain adapter is implemented with IGN/CNIG PNOA-LiDAR MDT terrain, ETH canopy fallback for CHM, PNOA RGB WMS, and Sentinel-2 NIR. Belgium uses Flanders DHMV II DTM/DSM and Flanders RGB orthophoto with Sentinel-2 NIR; Czechia uses CUZK DMR 5G/DMP 1G and ORTOFOTO with Sentinel-2 NIR; Denmark is currently fallback pending Dataforsyningen/Klimadatastyrelsen DHM token access; Estonia uses Maa-amet RGB/CIR orthophoto when reachable and fallback terrain/CHM; Finland records NLS/MML interfaces but falls back because anonymous requests return 401; France uses IGN Geoplateforme MNT/MNS plus BD ORTHO RGB/IRC; Latvia records LGIA open file routes but falls back for unattended builds; Luxembourg uses ACT/data.public.lu national terrain with ETH canopy fallback and geoportail.lu RGB/infrared orthophoto. These EEA countries use Copernicus HRL Dominant Leaf Type for tree typing; registered countries without a national adapter build through explicit global/continental fallback sources.
coverage: NATO member states; national Tier-A paths for Belgium (BEL/BE), Czechia (CZE/CZ), Estonia (EST/EE), Finland (FIN/FI), France (FRA/FR), Latvia (LVA/LV), Luxembourg (LUX/LU), the Netherlands (NLD/NL), Norway (NOR/NO), and Spain (ESP/ES), Denmark (DNK/DK) fallback pending DHM token access, global fallback for registered members without national adapters, and EEA/CLMS continental enrichment where available.

bundled.adapters/be.py: Belgium Flanders DHMV II DTM/DSM acquisition adapter with Flanders RGB and Sentinel-2 NIR
bundled.adapters/cz.py: Czechia CUZK DMR 5G/DMP 1G acquisition adapter with ORTOFOTO RGB and Sentinel-2 NIR
bundled.adapters/dk.py: Denmark fallback adapter pending Dataforsyningen/Klimadatastyrelsen DHM token access
bundled.adapters/ee.py: Estonia Maa-amet WMS imagery adapter with fallback terrain and forest-masked ETH canopy
bundled.adapters/fi.py: Finland fallback adapter recording NLS/MML 2 m DEM and orthophoto routes that currently require anonymous-unavailable API access
bundled.adapters/fr.py: France IGN Geoplateforme MNT/MNS and BD ORTHO RGB/IRC acquisition adapter
bundled.adapters/lv.py: Latvia fallback adapter recording LGIA open DTM/LAS/RGB/IR file routes for sources too heavy for unattended DSM assembly
bundled.adapters/lu.py: Luxembourg ACT/data.public.lu national terrain adapter with geoportail.lu RGB/infrared imagery and ETH canopy fallback
bundled.adapters/_shared.py: Shared helper functions for NATO national acquisition adapters
bundled.adapters/no.py: Norway Kartverket NHM DTM/DOM acquisition adapter with Sentinel-2 RGB+NIR imagery fallback
bundled.adapters/es.py: Spain IGN/CNIG MDT acquisition adapter with ETH canopy CHM fallback, PNOA RGB, and Sentinel-2 NIR
bundled.adapters/eea.py: Shared Copernicus HRL Dominant Leaf Type plus CLC+/Natura context fetchers
bundled.adapters/global.py: Global fallback: Copernicus GLO-30 terrain, ETH canopy, Sentinel-2 imagery, CGLS/WorldCover typing
bundled.vegetation.py: NATO vegetation typing hook with leaf-type grid support
